How Additive Manufacturing Transforms the Sporting Goods Industry
Know Your Materials: LOCTITE 3D IND405 Clear

meta_description: Learn the differences and similarities between insert molding and overmolding and which type of molding is best suited for your project.

sections.heading: Understanding Insert Molding vs. Overmolding
sections.text: Understanding Insert Molding vs. Overmolding Published on July 6, 2022 Originally published on fastradius.com on July 6, 2022 Injection molding involves injecting molten plastic into a mold, cooling it, and ejecting it. Manufacturers can repeat the process to quickly and cost-efficiently to create thousands of identical parts. Several subprocesses fall under the general umbrella of injection molding, including insert molding and overmolding (a.k.a. multi-shot injection molding, two-shot injection molding, or double-injection molding). Keep reading to learn the differences and similarities between insert molding and overmolding, their applications, and how to figure out which type of multi-m...
